sourcesContent:
import { useState } from "react"; import { Plus, Edit2, Trash2, ArrowUpDown, Image as ImageIcon } from "lucide-react"; import { Sheet, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetTrigger } from "../components/ui/sheet"; import { Label } from "../components/ui/label"; import { Input } from "../components/ui/input"; import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "../components/ui/select"; interface Meal { id: number; image: string; name: string; category: string; calories: number; protein: number; carbs: number; fat: number; } const mockMeals: Meal[] = [ { id: 1, image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=100&h=100&fit=crop", name: "Grilled Chicken Salad", category: "Lunch", calories: 380, protein: 42, carbs: 18, fat: 15, }, { id: 2, image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1525351484163-7529414344d8?w=100&h=100&fit=crop", name: "Protein Pancakes", category: "Breakfast", calories: 320, protein: 28, carbs: 35, fat: 8, }, { id: 3, image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1623428187969-5da2dcea5ebf?w=100&h=100&fit=crop", name: "Salmon & Quinoa Bowl", category: "Dinner", calories: 520, protein: 38, carbs: 45, fat: 22, }, { id: 4, image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1511690656952-34342bb7c2f2?w=100&h=100&fit=crop", name: "Avocado Toast", category: "Breakfast", calories: 280, protein: 12, carbs: 32, fat: 14, }, { id: 5, image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512621776951-a57141f2eefd?w=100&h=100&fit=crop", name: "Mediterranean Wrap", category: "Lunch", calories: 420, protein: 24, carbs: 48, fat: 16, }, { id: 6, image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1626645738196-c2a7c87a8f58?w=100&h=100&fit=crop", name: "Beef Stir Fry", category: "Dinner", calories: 480, protein: 36, carbs: 42, fat: 18, }, { id: 7, image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1587049352846-4a222e784e38?w=100&h=100&fit=crop", name: "Greek Yogurt Parfait", category: "Breakfast", calories: 240, protein: 18, carbs: 28, fat: 6, }, { id: 8, image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1565299624946-b28f40a0ae38?w=100&h=100&fit=crop", name: "Margherita Pizza", category: "Dinner", calories: 680, protein: 28, carbs: 82, fat: 26, }, ]; export function NutritionManager() { const [meals, setMeals] = useState(mockMeals); const [isDrawerOpen, setIsDrawerOpen] = useState(true); // Set to true to show the drawer state const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState<"name" | "calories" | "category">("name"); const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ name: "", category: "", calories: "", protein: "", carbs: "", fat: "", image: null as File | null, }); const [imagePreview, setImagePreview] = useState(""); const handleImageChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent) => { const file = e.target.files?.[0]; if (file) { setFormData({ ...formData, image: file }); const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onloadend = () => { setImagePreview(reader.result as string); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } }; const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); console.log("Form submitted:", formData); setIsDrawerOpen(false); // Reset form setFormData({ name: "", category: "", calories: "", protein: "", carbs: "", fat: "", image: null, }); setImagePreview(""); }; const handleDelete = (id: number) => { setMeals(meals.filter(meal => meal.id !== id)); }; return (
{/* Page Header */}

setFormData({ ...formData, name: e.target.value })} className="bg-[#121212] border-[#2a2a2a] focus:border-[#39FF14]" />
{/* Category */}
{/* Calories */}
setFormData({ ...formData, calories: e.target.value })} className="bg-[#121212] border-[#2a2a2a] focus:border-[#39FF14]" />
{/* Macronutrients */}
setFormData({ ...formData, protein: e.target.value })} className="bg-[#121212] border-[#2a2a2a] focus:border-[#39FF14]" />
setFormData({ ...formData, carbs: e.target.value })} className="bg-[#121212] border-[#2a2a2a] focus:border-[#39FF14]" />
setFormData({ ...formData, fat: e.target.value })} className="bg-[#121212] border-[#2a2a2a] focus:border-[#39FF14]" />
